name: Healthy Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour plus more for dusting
3/4 cup tomato sauce or your favorite purchased brand
6 oz low fat mozzarella cheese, coarsely grated
sliced red yellow or green peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500°F.
2. In a small bowl, proof the yeast with sugar in 1/4 cup of the water, tightly covered, for 5 minutes or until the yeast is foamy.
3. Transfer the yeast mixture to a bowl, stir in the additional water, flours, and salt, and combine well.
4. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead it (adding additional flour or water as necessary) for 10 minutes or until smooth and elastic.
5. Place dough in a lightly oiled bowl, turn to coat with oil, and let rise tightly covered in a warm place for 1 hour or until doubled in bulk.
6. Shape dough into 6 balls and roll out each into a 5-inch round for thick crust or 9-inch round for thin crust.
7. Transfer rounds onto cookie sheets and spread 2 tablespoons of sauce on top of each one.
8. Arrange optional toppings over the sauce and sprinkle with 1/6th of the cheese.
9. Bake in preheated oven on the bottom rack for 10 to 12 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
